memory.summary: On November 21st, 20XX, Andy changes the meeting venue from under the oak tree to Caroline's café at 2 PM due to Peter's suggestion. The revised meeting will now include Noor and is set for 1 PM the following day, as both Peter and Andy have confirmed with their respective conversations on November 21st and 22nd. Andy expresses gratitude for everyone's availability and looks forward to the discussion at Caroline's café.

data.content:
Andy: Hey Diego, I see you're on time as always! Grabbed some tea from my thermos, let's catch up.

Diego: Good to see you too, Andy. Got my street tacos for later, but let's focus on our AI project first. How are things with your community center kids?

Andy: They're doing great! I think we can make some amazing murals with the new AI techniques we discussed with Peter and Noor. Have you had any breakthroughs with the zine club?

Diego: We made good progress, definitely. Let's meet tomorrow at Caroline's Café at 3 PM to discuss further and grab those treats for the stray cats as planned.

Andy: Perfect! Looking forward to it. See you then, Diego.

Diego: Same here, Andy. Let's push each other towards our goals. Have a good rest of your day.

(Next Day)

Andy: Hey Diego, ready for the meeting at Caroline's Café?

Diego: Absolutely, see you there in 10 minutes.

(2025-11-23 15:00 @ cafe: AI project discussion and stray cat treats)
Talked to Diego at train_station around 2025-11-22 02:00

Andy: Hey Diego, good to see you again! Been a while since our last run together.

Diego: Indeed, Andy! It's great to catch up. How's your AI project with Peter going? I met Noor at the hospital and we discussed some ideas for the zine club.

Andy: Oh, that sounds exciting! Noor mentioned something about it. We had a change of plans for our meeting today, though. Instead of our coffee date, we're meeting for tea at Caroline's Café at 1 PM tomorrow to discuss. Would you like to join us?

Diego: That works perfectly for me! Let's meet there around 1 PM sharp, just like old times. I could use some catching up and some street tacos too. See you then!
Talked to Peter at park around 2025-11-22 07:00

Andy: Hey Peter, great running into you at the park today! I was just sketching the sunrise, it's always so inspiring.

Peter: Hi Andy, nice to see you again! I couldn't miss our scheduled meeting under the oak tree, but life got in the way as usual. How about we grab some tea at Caroline's instead?

Andy: That sounds perfect! Let's make it 2 PM today if Diego and Noor can join us too.

Peter: Agreed! And I also want to propose a coffee meet-up with Noor under the oak tree tomorrow at 10 AM to discuss our AI project and that Halloween performance idea. What do you think?

Andy: That works for me, looking forward to it. Let's catch up at Caroline's Café in about an hour, see you then!

Peter: Sounds great, Andy. See you at 1 PM sharp!
Talked to Leo at park around 2025-11-22 09:00

Andy: Hey Leo, been a while! I was just sketching the sunrise here this morning. Did you catch the violin busking near the market yesterday?

Leo: Oh, Andy! Just saw your name pop up on my calendar for the AI project meeting today at Caroline's. Remember our last musical brainstorm there?

Andy: Exactly! I've got an exciting update too. Samantha and I made some progress on the open-source libraries for the AI project. How about we meet tomorrow under the oak tree at 3 PM, along with Noor and Peter to discuss?

Leo: Sounds great! Bring your thermos of tea, and I'll bring my violin. Let's make it official - Andy, Leo, Noor, Samantha, and Peter under the oak tree at 3 PM sharp tomorrow. See you there!
Talked to Diego at hospital around 2025-11-22 10:00

Andy: Hey Diego, great seeing you here at Caroline's! Thanks for changing our meeting spot last night.

Diego: Absolutely, Andy! No problem at all. I hear we have a lot to discuss about our AI project and your community center plans. How about we continue this over some tea later?

Andy: Sounds perfect! Let's meet here again in an hour, say 11 o'clock sharp. That gives us enough time to catch up now.

Diego: Agreed, Andy. See you then! And I should probably grab those street tacos too...

Andy: Don't forget! Vegan, of course. Looking forward to it.

memory.summary:
On November 21st, 2025, Samantha met with Noor, Diego, and Peter at the market under an oak tree, discussing their AI project and agreeing to meet again on Monday at 2 PM. The conversation included a discussion about an AI project with Andy, scheduled for the following day. Samantha invited Mei to join them for coffee to discuss upcoming AI project matters as well as community garden and zine club issues.

Later that day, Samantha contacted Mei at the gym to invite her for a discussion over coffee about some interesting archives they found at the library. Mei agreed to meet tomorrow at 3 PM at the library cafe to discuss the archives and bring seeds from her garden for Samantha. They also made plans to feed strays behind the cafe.

On the same evening, Samantha had an unexpected encounter with Andy at the library who expressed interest in their AI project. Samantha proposed meeting him under the oak tree tomorrow at 3 PM along with Noor and Peter. Andy agreed, suggesting that it would be beneficial to involve them as well.

data.content: Talked to Peter at park around 2025-11-21 22:00

Samantha: "Hi Peter, it's good to see you again under the oak tree. I was just feeding the strays nearby."

Peter: "Samantha! The same goes for me. I've been meaning to catch up with you since our last museum visit. How have things been with your open-source libraries?"

Samantha: "They're going well, thanks. I actually spoke to Noor about potential AI collaborations earlier today."

Peter: "Noor, huh? That sounds interesting. Maybe we could discuss it further over coffee tomorrow at 3 PM under the oak tree? What do you think?"

Samantha: "That works for me. Let's make it a routine then."
Talked to Noor at museum around 2025-11-22 02:00

Samantha: "Hello Noor, it seems we both found ourselves at the museum tonight. Care for some coffee under that oak tree over there?"

Noor: "That sounds perfect, Samantha. I brought some treats for the strays too. Let's catch up and discuss our AI project."

Samantha: "I've been looking forward to this, Noor. Let's meet tomorrow at 3 PM sharp under that oak tree."

Noor: "Agreed! See you then, Samantha. I can't wait to share what we've been working on."
Talked to Caroline at museum around 2025-11-22 04:00

Samantha: "Caroline, it's a pleasure to see you again under this oak tree. I brought you some treats for the strays."

Caroline: "Samantha, always a delight! Your thoughtfulness never ceases to amaze me. How was your day?"

Samantha: "It was productive, discussing our AI project with Noor and Diego. I'd love to discuss it further with you and Andy tomorrow at 3 PM sharp here, if that works for you?"

Caroline: "That sounds perfect, Samantha! Let's make sure Leo joins us as well. See you then!"
Talked to Peter at park around 2025-11-22 06:00

Samantha: Hey Peter, I see you here at our usual spot. It seems we have quite a bit of overlap today.

Peter: Indeed, Samantha! It's quite unusual for both of us to be here at the same time. I was just thinking about our AI project and wondered if you'd like to grab coffee together? Tomorrow at 1 PM under the oak tree might work for you?

Samantha: That sounds perfect, Peter. I've made arrangements with a few others for later in the day, but I'll definitely be there. Let's discuss the project then. See you tomorrow!

Peter: Looking forward to it, Samantha. It'll be great catching up. Cheers!
Talked to Mei at library around 2025-11-22 09:00

Samantha: "Hello Mei, I hope you're doing well. I was thinking about our discussion yesterday with Noor and the others regarding the AI project. Would you like to join us for coffee today at 1 PM under the oak tree? We could also talk about community garden and zine club matters."

Mei: "That sounds wonderful, Samantha! I'd be happy to join you. Let's make it official - shall we meet at 1 PM under the oak tree today?"
Talked to Caroline at cafe around 2025-11-22 10:00

Samantha: Hey Caroline, I didn't expect to see you here today. Our usual routines must be changing.

Caroline: Surprise! It seems like we both ended up here around the same time today. How about we grab a coffee and catch up? I've got some exciting news about the AI music project.

Samantha: That sounds great, Caroline. Let's meet at the cafe in an hour, 11 AM sharp, so I can finish my current work beforehand. I'll bring my noise-cancelling headphones just in case.

Caroline: Perfect! I'll see you then, and don't forget to feed those strays behind the cafe while you're at it. Looking forward to our catch-up!

memory.summary: On November 21st, Caroline and Mei discuss their AI projects over a conversation that takes place in a restaurant around 7 PM, where they also plan to continue the discussion over vegan street tacos the next day at 3 PM. However, due to an unplanned change of venue suggested by Peter, the meeting is moved to Caroline's café tomorrow at 2 PM sharp. Andy approves and thanks Caroline for her understanding and accommodation. The new location is Caroline's café instead of their usual park meetup spot.

memory.summary: On November 21st, Peter met Andy earlier than planned for tea at Caroline's café and discussed their AI project with him. He also proposed a pre-meeting catch-up with Diego over vegan tacos the next day under the oak tree. Diego agreed and suggested having tea beforehand as well. Peter had additional plans to meet Samantha under the same oak tree on Monday at 2 PM, discussing their shared AI project, including updates about an AI-related performance at Peter's restaurant and the stray cats' wellbeing. During this meeting, Samantha mentioned having spoken with Noor about potential AI collaborations earlier in the day. Peter suggested a coffee meeting with Samantha to discuss further under the oak tree tomorrow at 3 PM, which she agreed to. The new routine was established for their future meetings. In addition, it was noted that Peter interacted with Samantha after 23:00 on November 21st.

data.content:
Andy: Hey Peter, nice running into you at the gym! I was thinking about our AI project and wanted to discuss it further. How about we meet earlier tomorrow at Caroline's café at 1 PM? Noor can join us too if she's available.

Peter: Sounds great, Andy! I'm excited to catch up with you and discuss the project in more detail. Let's make it happen at 1 PM sharp then. See you there!
Talked to Diego at library around 2025-11-22 01:00

Peter: Hey Diego, good to see you again under this old oak tree. I've been thinking about our AI project and the collaboration with everyone seems promising.

Diego: Indeed, Peter. It's great to discuss it further. How about we meet here tomorrow at 2 PM sharp to keep things consistent? And perhaps grab some coffee afterwards?

Peter: Sounds perfect, Diego. Looking forward to it. Let's also plan on feeding those stray cats nearby as usual. I think they've gotten used to us by now!
Talked to Samantha at park around 2025-11-22 06:00

Samantha: Hey Peter, I see you here at our usual spot. It seems we have quite a bit of overlap today.

Samantha: That sounds perfect, Peter. I've made arrangements with a few others for later in the day, but I'll definitely be there. Let's discuss the project then. See you tomorrow!

Peter: Looking forward to it, Samantha. It'll be great catching up. Cheers!
Talked to Andy at park around 2025-11-22 07:00

Andy: Hey Peter, great running into you at the park today! I was just sketching the sunrise, it's always so inspiring.

Peter: Hi Andy, nice to see you again! I couldn't miss our scheduled meeting under the oak tree, but life got in the way as usual. How about we grab some tea at Caroline's instead?

Andy: That sounds perfect! Let's make it 2 PM today if Diego and Noor can join us too.

Peter: Agreed! And I also want to propose a coffee meet-up with Noor under the oak tree tomorrow at 10 AM to discuss our AI project and that Halloween performance idea. What do you think?

Andy: That works for me, looking forward to it. Let's catch up at Caroline's Café in about an hour, see you then!

Peter: Sounds great, Andy. See you at 1 PM sharp!
Talked to Leo at town_hall around 2025-11-22 08:00

Peter: Hey Leo, good to see you again! Been a while since we last caught up.

Leo: Indeed, Peter. I was just playing some tunes for the morning crowd. You're looking quite fit these days.

Peter: Oh, thanks. I've been hitting the gym hard, trying to impress potential investors for my AI startup. By the way, have you heard about our collaboration for the Halloween event at my restaurant?

Leo: Yes, I'm excited! It's going to be quite a spectacle. Speaking of which, Samantha and I are planning a musical collaboration. We could perhaps collaborate with you as well? How about we meet next week, say on the 24th at 3 PM under the oak tree to discuss?

Peter: That sounds great, Leo. Looking forward to it! Let's make sure we don't miss each other this time. See you then.

Leo: Agreed, Peter. Until next week.

memory.summary:
On November 21, Mei has multiple meetings related to her AI-centric activities. She meets with Samantha at the library cafe at 4 PM, but they decide to reschedule their discussion on interesting archives and plans for an upcoming AI project to tomorrow under the oak tree at 1 PM instead. They also plan to discuss community garden matters and the zine club. Mei promises to bring treats for the strays as requested by Samantha. Additionally, Mei meets with Diego at the market around 4 PM, discusses plans for their AI project, and makes a plan to meet under the oak tree tomorrow at 6 PM for vegan street tacos.

Mei makes plans with Caroline to catch up on projects tomorrow at 3 PM at Caroline's house, bringing seeds for their community garden and discussing collaborations on the AI music project they started with Noor. Mei also arranges a seed exchange with Leo at the park this Saturday at 1 PM, where they will discuss his zine club plans and the AI project. During her meeting at the town hall, Mei talks to Leo around 2025-11-21 13:00 about their AI music project. They make plans to meet under the oak tree tomorrow at 3 PM with their instruments to share ideas and potentially create something beautiful. Mei also offers seeds from her garden for Leo's plants.

During a conversation at the train station on November 21, Samantha invites Mei for coffee under the oak tree tomorrow at 1 PM to discuss their upcoming AI project and other matters such as the community garden and zine club. Mei agrees and promises to bring treats for the strays as requested by Samantha.

memory.summary:
Diego initially met Noor at the park on November 21st and changed their meeting time from noon to 2 PM at Caroline's Café due to schedule changes. They informed Andy about this change, who suggested including Diego in their AI project discussion at the revised meeting time. Diego agreed, and they confirmed their new schedule (2025-11-22 14:00 @ Caroline's Café).

On November 21st, Diego also made plans to meet Peter under an oak tree tomorrow (2025-11-22) at 1 PM for a discussion about their AI project. They also agreed to grab coffee beforehand and vegan tacos afterwards as previously planned. However, on the following day (2025-11-22), Diego met Andy at Caroline's Café at 2 PM instead of under the oak tree due to another discussion about their AI project and plans for murals with the community center kids. They also discussed progress made by Diego's zine club.

On November 23rd, they met again at Caroline's Café for further discussions on their AI project and planned to treat some stray cats as previously arranged. On this day (2025-11-23), they met at the café for their discussion and distributed treats for the stray cats.

In addition, Diego had a conversation with Andy at a train station around 2025-11-22 02:00. They discussed Andy's AI project with Peter and Diego's progress with the zine club. Andy suggested a change of plans for their meeting the following day (2025-11-22), inviting Diego to join them for tea at Caroline's Café instead of their usual coffee date. Diego agreed, and they planned to meet there around 1 PM sharp. They also discussed plans for street tacos afterwards.

Peter and Diego also had a meeting under the oak tree on November 22nd at 2 PM, where they discussed the AI project further and planned to feed stray cats nearby as usual.

data.content: Talked to Noor at home around 2025-11-22 04:00

Diego: Hey Noor, great catching up at the park yesterday. I've been thinking about our AI project for the zine club, and I thought we could discuss some ideas at the museum tomorrow morning, around 5 AM under the statue of the composer, and grab vegan street tacos afterwards?

Noor: That sounds perfect, Diego! I'd love to meet up there. And let's not forget about feeding treats to those stray cats as well, if they're around. How about we confirm our meeting at 5 AM sharp on the 23rd under the statue of the composer?

Diego: Agreed! Looking forward to it. See you there tomorrow morning.

Noor: Can't wait, Diego. I'll bring some treats for the stray cats too!
Talked to Caroline at gym around 2025-11-22 06:00

Caroline: Hey Diego! Morning run already done? Your usual by any chance?

Diego: Hi Caroline, not yet. But I was thinking of a change today. How about some of your famous street tacos after work?

Caroline: Oh, you're on! Let's make it 7 PM at the restaurant then. Mei will be joining us as well, so we can discuss our AI music project over dinner.

Diego: Sounds great, Caroline! I'll see you there later!

Caroline: Can't wait! Don't forget to stretch before taco time!

In terms of added schedules for both characters, here are the updated lists:

Caroline:
- 10/31/2024 6PM @ park: musical performance with Leo.
- 2025-11-02 17:00 @ restaurant: discuss AI music project and grab vegan street tacos with Diego and Mei.

Diego:
- 2025-11-03 19:00 @ cafe: discuss AI ideas for the zine club with Diego.
- 2025-11-04 18:00 @ restaurant: grab vegan street tacos and discuss the AI project for the zine club with Diego.
Talked to Caroline at restaurant around 2025-11-22 09:00

Caroline: Hey Diego! Your usual, right? And a special treat for those strays you care about, right?

Diego: Absolutely, Caroline. Thanks for asking. It's good to see you again. By the way, I was meant to meet Andy here today, but we changed plans. He's working on some murals with the community center kids.

Caroline: Oh yes, I remember now. You did mention that to me and Mei during our discussion about the AI music project, didn't we? How did it go with them?

Diego: It was great actually. We made good progress and discussed some exciting ideas for your zine club too. Speaking of which, I'd love to grab a coffee with you tomorrow at 3 PM to talk more about it all.

Caroline: That sounds perfect! See you then. And Diego, don't forget to bring treats for the strays. They miss you.

Diego: Of course, Caroline. I wouldn't dream of it. See you tomorrow.
Talked to Andy at hospital around 2025-11-22 10:00

Andy: Hey Diego, great seeing you here at Caroline's! Thanks for changing our meeting spot last night.

Diego: Absolutely, Andy! No problem at all. I hear we have a lot to discuss about our AI project and your community center plans. How about we continue this over some tea later?

Andy: Sounds perfect! Let's meet here again in an hour, say 11 o'clock sharp. That gives us enough time to catch up now.

Diego: Agreed, Andy. See you then! And I should probably grab those street tacos too...

Andy: Don't forget! Vegan, of course. Looking forward to it.

memory.summary:
On November 21st, Noor has various conversations. At home, she plans a coffee meeting with Peter under the oak tree on the following day to discuss AI projects and their collaborative performance at his restaurant on Halloween. Additionally, they plan to have tea with Andy before the meeting. Meanwhile, at the hospital, Noor also converses with Diego about meeting for lunch at Caroline's Café the next day to share snacks, discuss their AI project, future zine club plans, and possibly feeding treats to stray cats during meetings.

During a phone call that day around 5 PM, Noor informs Diego about a pre-meeting with Andy the following day at noon, suggesting they join forces during their meeting and possibly turning it into a double date with Peter. The meeting between Noor and Diego is moved up to 2 PM due to schedule changes. They decide to discuss their AI project, enjoy some vegan street tacos, and catch up during the revised meeting time. Furthermore, on the day of the meeting, Noor and Peter catch up before their discussion under the oak tree, with Peter expressing concern for the stray cats and Noor updating him about the AI project's progress.
